label: Ledger Cellar
description: Ledger Cellar forms the tavern’s secured store, walled in soot-dark brick and cinched with riveted iron straps that mirror Cindervale’s fortified craft. Heavy shelving of tarred oak holds casked drink, dried staples, and bundled linens under a ceiling webbed with chain-hung lamps dulled behind smoke-stained glass. A posted slate of stamped inventory marks and licensing tallies turns the space into an extension of the house’s lawbound character. The floor is laid in worn tile that drains toward a grated channel, reflecting quarantine-minded upkeep in a city of interdiction nights.
